heading: Regulations governing Federal licensing
label: 208 Regulations governing Federal licensing
text: The Secretary of Commerce is authorized to promulgate regulations specifying the terms and conditions upon which any federally owned invention, other than inventions owned by the Tennessee Valley Authority, may be licensed on a nonexclusive, partially exclusive, or exclusive basis.
notes: Amendments1984— substituted “Secretary of Commerce” for “Administrator of General Services”.Pub. L. 98–620

Effective DateSection effective , but implementing regulations authorized to be issued earlier, see , set out as an Effective Date of 1980 Amendment note under .July 1, 1981section 8(f) of Pub. L. 96–517section 41 of this title
